posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: 12% of ALL Haitians are now in the United States, that's 1.7 million. 53% of Haitians are on welfare, yet manage to send so much money home that remittances from the U.S. accounts for nearly 25% of the entire Haitian economy.

twitter.content:
~12% of Haitians, 1.7 million people, now live in the United States.

Between 450,000 & 550,000 entered under the Biden admin's open border policies.

15-25% of the Haitian economy are remittances from the US. At least 53% of Haitians rely on welfare.

We need mass deportations.
